name: Prince Hammond
tagline: I'm Prince Hammond, a CS student and aspiring developer who believes great code is both functional and beautiful.
bio: I'm Prince Hammond, a Computer Science student who turns caffeine into code and ideas into interactive experiences. My journey into development started not in a classroom, but with the pure curiosity of wanting to build something that works. The first time I made a button change color with JavaScript, I was hooked. Now, I spend my days architecting clean interfaces, debugging with determination, and constantly asking, 'How can I make this faster, smoother, or more intuitive?' I thrive at the intersection of logic and creativity. Whether it's crafting responsive frontends with React or designing efficient backends with Node.js, I love the process of solving real problems with code.
